\tzpentry{ID4481}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4481 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:universal-invariant} \mathcal{I}_{\mathrm{univ}} := \left\{ \begin{aligned} &\text{Elsasser:} && \Lambda \approx 1 \pm 0.5, \\ &\text{Critical exponent:} && \tau = \tfrac{3}{2}, \\ &\text{Helicity quantization:} && \mathcal{H}_M = n\,\hbar_{\mathrm{eff}}, \quad n \in \mathbb{Z}, \\ &\text{Information bits:} && N_{\mathrm{bits}} = \log_2(153600) \approx 17.23. \end{aligned} \right. \end{equation}
